prs.title: Simplify profile click; add How it Works
prs.body:
Remove the async profile fetch and loading state from Navbar: handleProfileClick now only toggles the profile menu and the button no longer uses the disabled/loading styles, reducing extra API calls and complexity. Update WhyNiveshNidhi: adjust advantage image sizing and container overflow, introduce a steps array, and add a new “How it works” section with step cards and an embedded demo video to explain the flow to users.

prs.title: Polish chatbot UI, KYC and page layouts
prs.body:
Revamps UI/UX across the app: major restyle of the Chatbot (simplified welcome text, streamlined message rendering, updated sizes, loader, input and header styles, removed unused icon imports and complex JSON action rendering). Redesigned page hero sections and layouts for BenefitsOfChits, DocumentsRequired, EligibilityCriteria and a full rewrite of ChitProcess (new step layout, example data grid and CTA). Improved KYC form UX and logic: Aadhaar input formatting/validation, city autocomplete, visual status indicators, DigiLocker info and a two-column responsive layout. Also added frontend/package-lock.json to .gitignore and applied minor package-lock metadata adjustments.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

prs.title: Restrict phone input to 10 digits
prs.body:
Sanitize and limit the phone input to a 10-digit Indian number. The onChange handler now strips non-digit characters and only updates state when length <= 10. Added maxLength and pattern attributes to reinforce client-side validation and improve UX.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Enhanced phone number input validation in the signup process to enforce a 10-digit format, automatically remove non-numeric characters, and prevent over-length entries for improved data quality.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

prs.title: Add auth/API client
prs.body:
Rework auth flow and add core client utilities: AuthContext refactored to persist user/token, expose signup/login/update/logout helpers and show onboarding/login success modals. Add axios API client (frontend/src/lib/api.js) with grouped endpoints for auth, users, admin, organizers, chitGroups, escrow and chatbot. Introduce utility modules: cn (clsx + tailwind-merge) and Aadhaar validator. Add reusable hooks useIsMobile and a toast system (use-toast). Add many new pages/components for admin, organizer application and chit flows (e.g. AdminDashboard, ApplyOrganizer, ChitGroups, ChitGroupDetails, ChitProcess, Kyc, UserDashboard, etc.). Update .gitignore with common ignores. Remove legacy auth/dashboard/login/signup CSS/JSX files that were replaced by the new implementation. These changes prepare the app for API integration, improved auth UX and organizer/admin workflows.

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **New Features**
  * Admin dashboard for managing organizer applications and escrow operations
  * Organizer application workflow with multi-step form and validation
  * Chit group marketplace with browsing, detailed views, and payment integration
  * KYC verification process with Aadhaar validation
  * User investment dashboard displaying joined groups and transaction history
  * Organizer management hub for group administration and member handling
  * Government schemes information directory
  * Enhanced authentication flow with modal-based user onboarding
  * Toast notification system for user feedback

* **Refactor**
  * Removed legacy authentication and dashboard pages; replaced with new flows

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

prs.title: Fix: Missing Indonesian Translations in Navigation Menus
prs.body:
---

### 📝 Fix: Missing Indonesian Translations in Navigation Menus

**Problem**
When switching the editor language to Bahasa Indonesia, several navigation menu items remained in English. This resulted in inconsistent localization and a fragmented user experience.

**Solution**
Added the missing Indonesian translations for all relevant menu items across **Edit**, **View**, **Settings**, and **Help** sections to ensure full UI consistency in the Indonesian locale.

---

### ✅ Changes Included

#### **Edit Menu**

* `edit` → **"Sunting"**

#### **View Menu**

* `dbml_view` → **"Tampilan DBML"**
* `header` → **"Bilah Menu"**
* `sidebar` → **"Bilah Samping"**
* `show_relationship_labels` → **"Tampilkan label hubungan"**
* `snap_to_grid` → **"Sejajarkan ke grid"**

#### **Settings Menu**

* `export_saved_data` → **"Ekspor data yang disimpan"**
* `clear_cache` → **"Bersihkan cache"**

#### **Help Menu**

* `docs` → **"Dokumentasi"**

---

### 🔍 Testing & Verification

* Confirmed translations are grammatically correct and standard in Bahasa Indonesia
* Verified UI properly reflects localized strings when switching to the Indonesian locale
* No breaking changes or side effects to existing functionality

---

### 📂 Files Updated

* `src/i18n/locales/id.js`

---

Resolves inconsistent localization for Indonesian users and improves overall product polish. 🚀

---
